name: dryft
description: A queryable feature index for AI coding agents.

interface.longDescription: Dryft gives AI coding agents a structured, queryable view of your codebase's features. Agents call MCP tools to find which feature a file belongs to, list all features, or look up details from dryft.yml instead of inventing a new naming convention every session.
defaultPrompt: Before editing files, ask Dryft which feature each file belongs to.
List the features in this codebase using Dryft.
